title: ANGIX 20 x Silver Gift Bows with Matching Ribbon Cops Set Luxury Metallic Foil Shiny Design Decorative Bow for Christmas, New Year & Party Presents
features: Quantity :- Includes 20 Medium bows in silver colors with ribbon cops. These peel and stick strong self adhesive bows are such an elegant addition & yet so simple to apply. No tape needed just peel & stick. Ideal gift pack for any occasion.

Premium Quality :- The silver metallic bow and cops are made from premium quality material. which is reusable, lightweight and durable. Gift bow is long time used and it is hard to break. Ribbon bow with metallic gloss, look bright and shiny color.

Usage :- The silver gift bow and ribbon cops are great for small package, like ring box, jewelry box, crafting, festivals, gifts wrapping, Christmas day and more occasions decoration, it can stick on windows, tables, wall, furniture, fridge and other places.

Suitable :- The silver gift bows and cops are suitable for all your holiday & celebration needs including Christmas gift wrap, birthdays and much more. Perfect for adding a wonderful touch to your Christmas gifts or birthday presents.

Great Looking :- Add the perfect finish to any present with these great looking silver bows and cops to give that gift an extra little something special. Metallic gift bow to really make your gift shine. All ages will appreciate the shiny addition.
